zh.Radnorshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯拉德諾斯爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan於0995年出生在威爾士格拉莫爾根時，她的父親Gwrgan of Glamorgan31歲，母親Angharad ferch Ednywain26歲。她和Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd至少有5個兒子和3個女兒。她去世於1030年在法國皮卡迪享年35歲。

zh-hans.Radnorshire, Wales: 英国威尔斯拉德諾斯爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan于0995年出生在威尔士格拉莫爾根时，她的父亲Gwrgan of Glamorgan31岁，母亲Angharad ferch Ednywain26岁。她和Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd至少有5个儿子和3个女儿。她去世于1030年在法国皮卡迪享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gwrgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Meath): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Geargáin ‘descendant of Geargán’ or shortened from Mac Geargáin ‘son of Geargán’, a personal name from a diminutive of garg ‘fierce’.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: ferch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan was born in 0995, in Glamorgan, Wales, her father, Gwrgan of Glamorgan, was 31 and her mother, Angharad ferch Ednywain, was 26. She had at least 5 sons and 3 daughters with Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd. She died in 1030, in Picardie, France, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan est née en 0995, à Glamorgan, Galles, son père, Gwrgan of Glamorgan, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Angharad ferch Ednywain, avait 26 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles avec Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd. Elle est décédée en 1030, à Picardie, France, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan 0995 in Glamorgan, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gwrgan of Glamorgan 31 und ihre Mutter Angharad ferch Ednywain 26. Sie hatte mit Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1030 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan è nata il nel 0995 nel Glamorgan, Galles, sua padre, Gwrgan of Glamorgan, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Angharad ferch Ednywain, aveva 26 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie con Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd. Morì nel 1030, nel Picardie, Francia, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorganが0995年にウェールズグラモーガンで生まれた時，父Gwrgan of Glamorganは31歳，母Angharad ferch Ednywainは26歳であった。彼女はCadwgon ap Elystan Glodryddとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1030年にフランスピカーディで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan(이)가 0995년 웨일스 글램르건에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gwrgan of Glamorgan(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Angharad ferch Ednywain(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1030년 프랑스 피카디에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Radnorshire, Wales: Radnorshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom
mg.Flintshire, Wales: Flintshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan nasceu em 0995, em Glamorgan, Gales, seu pai, Gwrgan of Glamorgan, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Angharad ferch Ednywain, tinha 26 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas com Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd. Ela faleceu em 1030, em Picardie, França, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan родилась в 0995 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gwrgan of Glamorgan было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Angharad ferch Ednywain, 26. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери от Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd. Она умерла в 1030 г. в местности пикарди, Франция в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eva ferch Gwrgan of Glamorgan nació en 0995, en Glamorgan, Gales, su papá, Gwrgan of Glamorgan, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Angharad ferch Ednywain, tenía 26 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas con Cadwgon ap Elystan Glodrydd. Murió en 1030, en Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 35 años.
